brief: US imposes new tariffs on dozens of countries; Pentagon list of Iran war deaths changes; Middle East crisis worsens. Protests in India and Indonesia babies trafficked to Singapore. AI usability studies and visualization tools dominate papers.
news_summary: US tariffs target 80+ countries over forced labor claims; Pentagon's list of Iran war deaths fluctuates; double stabbing in NYC probed as hate crime. India activist ends hunger strike; Indonesia babies trafficked to Singapore; LA homelessness rises.
papers_summary: Papers explore usability of conversational AI, edge bundling taxonomies, and creative writing AI on smart glasses. Frameworks for accessible AR for deaf students and semantics-driven visualization languages are introduced.

en.brief: US imposes new tariffs on dozens of countries; Pentagon list of Iran war deaths changes; Middle East crisis worsens. Protests in India and Indonesia babies trafficked to Singapore. AI usability studies and visualization tools dominate papers.
en.news_summary: US tariffs target 80+ countries over forced labor claims; Pentagon's list of Iran war deaths fluctuates; double stabbing in NYC probed as hate crime. India activist ends hunger strike; Indonesia babies trafficked to Singapore; LA homelessness rises.
en.papers_summary: Papers explore usability of conversational AI, edge bundling taxonomies, and creative writing AI on smart glasses. Frameworks for accessible AR for deaf students and semantics-driven visualization languages are introduced.

zh.brief: 胡塞武装威胁封锁曼德海峡加剧红海航运危机；美国对多国加征关税并签署沙特核协议，中东局势紧张；英国女子香港强奸案判刑，香港前议员胡志伟英国入境受阻。
zh.news_summary: 胡塞武装威胁封锁曼德海峡，全球石油贸易面临新冲击；美国与沙特签署核协议，引发核扩散担忧；英国女子在香港被裁定勒索等罪成立，判监六年。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无新增优先论文，跨语言论文展示了AI在写作、无障碍和可视化等领域的最新研究，如智能眼镜辅助写作和增强现实无障碍系统。

todays_image.caption: Arthur Roy Smith's pioneering airmail flights once bridged continents, now his legacy contrasts with trade tariffs and bird flu grounding modern global exchange.
todays_image.title: Photograph of airmail pilot Arthur Roy Smith
